name: agent-magnet
title: Agent Magnet
description: Self-learning memory for AI tools. Remembers preferences and context across Claude, Cursor, and Codex.

environmentVariables.name: MAGNET_LOCAL_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for local storage, no Redis needed

environmentVariables.name: MAGNET_OPENAI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for reflector model
